description: Search for or read a FHIR Immunization resource covering vaccine administration history. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide patient or identifier. Use vaccine-code for specific vaccines or date for time-based filtering.

searchParams._id: Immunization resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.location: Location where the vaccination was administered
searchParams.performer: Practitioner or organization who performed the vaccination
searchParams.reaction-date: Date of reaction to the immunization
searchParams.reason-reference: Condition or Observation why vaccine was given
searchParams.target-disease: Target disease the vaccine protects against
